scripts.build: npm run build:html && npm run build:assets
scripts.build:html: shx mkdir -p docs && shx cp -r src/html/* docs/
scripts.build:assets: shx mkdir -p docs/assets && shx cp -r src/assets/* docs/assets && shx sed -i 's/\.\.\/assets/assets/g' docs/index.html
scripts.lint: npm run lint:html && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:js
